questions.question: What is the percentage of e-waste generated from mobile phones, which, according to the E-Waste (Management and Handling) Rules, 2011, should be recycled by manufacturers in India?
questions.hint: According to rule 4 of the E-Waste (Management and Handling) Rules, 2011

questions.question: As per the E-Waste (Management and Handling) Rules, 2011, what is the role of the Secretary of the Central Pollution Control Board (CPCB)?
questions.hint: As per rule 11 of the E-Waste (Management and Handling) Rules, 2011

questions.question: Who is authorized to issue a 'Prohibition Order' under the E-Waste (Management and Handling) Rules, 2011?
questions.hint: As per rule 9 of the E-Waste (Management and Handling) Rules, 2011
